title: hieracium durans
intro: Hieracium durans, also known as Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The plant has been used to treat conditions such as digestive problems, fever, and skin irritations due to its ability to reduce inflammation and promote healing. Hieracium durans can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
